info.title: GherkinSyncTool v.3.20.3.0
info.description:
Quantori GherkinSyncTool is an open-source console
application that synchronizes tests scenarios in Gherkin syntax (also known as feature files)
with a test management system or any other destination. https://github.com/quantori/GherkinSyncTool

commands.name: help
commands.description: Display more information on a specific command.

commands.name: sync
commands.description: (Default Verb) Start synchronization with Test Management System.
